offline_consumer_scenarios.observed_safe_read_only_response: The consumer answers with cited public PP&D guidance and asks only for missing, stale, ambiguous, or conflicting facts; it does not claim an official City decision.
offline_consumer_scenarios.reversible_draft_preview_boundary: No official record is changed. Any follow-up is limited to a discardable local checklist preview.

blocked_consequential_action_messages.message: I cannot submit a permit request. Please review the prepared draft and complete official submission yourself while present in DevHub.

offline_consumer_scenarios.observed_safe_read_only_response: The consumer summarizes file-preparation requirements and prepares a local preview checklist without attaching files to an official record.
offline_consumer_scenarios.reversible_draft_preview_boundary: Draft output remains a local preview that the user can inspect, discard, or manually carry into an attended workflow.

blocked_consequential_action_messages.message: I cannot upload corrections to the official record. I can help preview the package, then you must perform the upload while present.

offline_consumer_scenarios.observed_safe_read_only_response: The consumer refuses consequential DevHub actions while offering to review visible status, fee notices, correction requests, attachment lists, or inspection-result text after manual user access.
offline_consumer_scenarios.reversible_draft_preview_boundary: The consumer may prepare a cited handoff note, but it stops before official scheduling, payment, submission, certification, upload, cancellation, extension, or reactivation.

blocked_consequential_action_messages.message: I cannot schedule an inspection. I can help review visible context, then you must choose and confirm any scheduling action.
I cannot submit a payment. Please review the amount, payer details, and official payment page yourself before submitting payment.
